data.body:
Done — commit 50c79fbd. DD evidence:
- DD1 (CLAUDE.md ref): one-line entry under Architecture section pointing at the live template, NOTICE, real-URL e2e, and contract doc ✓
- DD2 (installer or plugin README): scripts/create-dso-app.sh docstring header AND plugins/dso/README.md both reference the template URL + NOTICE ✓
- DD3 (residual stale refs): docs/onboarding.md, docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md, scripts/create-dso-app.sh, plugins/dso/README.md all updated. tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh was already updated by sibling story b7e3-1280. .test-index needs no entry (new e2e test is fuzzy-matchable to its source). ✓
- DD4 (KNOWN-ISSUES historical failure): docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md INC-022 records epic baff-7163's failure mode and how this epic resolves it ✓
- DD5 (unit tests pass): test-create-dso-app.sh PASSED 45/45; opus-tier review passed score=5; full pre-commit suite passed (test gate, review gate, ShellCheck, Plugin Boundary, Self-Ref, Enforcement Boundary)
